label: Curb Appeal Pak
blurb: Specialty Trades, Landscaping & Home Services. Route density, upselling, and proof of work.

skills.label: Service Warranty Expiration Upsell
skills.method: Identifies clients whose 1-year roof-wash or gutter-cleaning warranty is expiring this month, texting them a 10% discount to rebook.
trigger_examples: drives automated recurring revenue for tradesmen

skills.label: Before After Social Poster
skills.method: Stitches a muddy driveway photo with the clean driveway photo, adds the power-washing company's logo, and posts it to local Facebook groups.

skills.label: Lawn Mowing Route Densifier
skills.method: Groups weekly mowing appointments geographically, ensuring the crew doesn't drive across town twice in the same day.
trigger_examples: saves hundreds in gas and unlocks time for 2 extra jobs a day

skills.label: House Cleaning Walkthrough Quoter
skills.method: Takes inputs (2000 sqft, 2 dogs, hardwood floors) and instantly generates an accurate initial deep-clean bid and recurring bi-weekly price.
trigger_examples: converts leads instantly while the cleaner is on the phone

skills.label: Hoa Approval Document Packager
skills.method: Packages a fencing contractor's specs, boundary lines, and material choices into the exact PDF format the neighborhood HOA demands for approval.

skills.label: Painter Paint Gallon Estimator
skills.method: Calculates exact gallons needed by analyzing total wall square footage, subtracting windows/doors, and factoring in the porosity of the surface.
trigger_examples: stops painters from over-buying expensive materials

skills.label: Pool Cleaning Chemical Balancer
skills.method: Takes the raw numbers from a test strip (pH, alkalinity, cyanuric acid) and tells the pool boy exactly how many pounds of shock to add.
trigger_examples: turns junior laborers into expert pool chemists

skills.label: Pest Control Chemical Usage Logger
skills.method: Calculates and logs the exact ounces of pesticide sprayed at a specific address to comply with state Department of Agriculture regulations.

skills.label: Irrigation Weather Delay Notifier
skills.method: Automatically texts homeowners to reschedule their sprinkler winterization blow-out if an early freeze makes the ground too hard to work.

skills.label: Snow Plow Trigger Dispatcher
skills.method: Wakes up contracted drivers with an automated call the exact moment the local weather API registers 2 inches of snow accumulation.
trigger_examples: replaces 3 am manual alarm clocks and weather-watching
